name: hardcoded-openai-or-anthropic-key
message: Potential hardcoded AI provider key. Store it in Key Management or encrypted OAuth/account storage.
reminder: Do not commit provider API keys. Use encrypted secrets and per-agent env injection.

name: hardcoded-aws-access-key
reminder: Use encrypted Key Management secrets or workload identity, never checked-in credentials.

name: approval-bypass-language
reminder: Approval and command policy checks are core safety controls and must not be bypassed.

name: direct-sql-formatting
reminder: Use SQLAlchemy ORM or bound parameters for database queries.
